## SVG Path Data for ExtendScript

### Icon paths (viewBox 0 0 37.8171 39.6802)

For use in AE shape layers — convert SVG coordinates to AE vertex arrays:

```
Path 1 (right-bottom face):
  vertices: [[20.29, 21.13], [37.82, 21.13], [37.82, 32.30], [20.29, 39.68], [20.29, 21.13]]

Path 2 (right-top face):
  vertices: [[37.82, 18.55], [37.82, 7.38], [20.29, 0], [20.29, 18.54], [37.82, 18.55]]

Path 3 (left face):
  vertices: [[0, 7.38], [0, 32.30], [17.53, 39.68], [17.53, 0], [0, 7.38]]
```

Note: These are simplified linear paths. The original SVG uses only M, H, V, L, Z commands (no curves), so AE shape paths will be straight-line vertices with no bezier handles.
